Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(****************************************************************************************

 The universal mapping property of the enriched univalent Kleisli category

 In this file, we establish the universal mapping property of the enriched univalent
 Kleisli category. More precisely, we establish the mapping properties that show that
 the bicategory of enriched categories has Kleisli objects.

 The proof in this file is mostly formal. The main idea is as follows:
 - The universal property of the Rezk completion says that it is a left biadjoint to the
   inclusion from univalent categories into categories.
 - Left biadjoints preserve colimits.
 - Kleisli objects are colimits.
 However, we phrase this proof without any mention of bicategories. The reason for that,
 is that the aforementioned left biadjoint requires the existence of a Rezk completion
 that preserves the universe level, and we do not want to add this assumption to the
 formalization.

 The proof closely follows to how the universal mapping property was established for
 ordinary Kleisli categories (see `categories.KleisliCategory.v`). The main difference
 is that in this file, we need to take the enrichment into account. However, as the
 construction is mostly formal, one can deal with that by using suitable composition
 operators (i.e., composition for enriched functors).

 From a technical point, the main difficulty in the proof is that we constantly need
 to move between functor enrichments and objects of the enriched functor category. For
 that reason, there are numerous `Let` statements in this file. Their purposes is solely
 to give a name to objects in the category of enriched functors, so that we can use them
 systematically.

 Finally, note that we assume that the category `V` has equalizers. This is needed,
 because we construct the univalent Kleisli category as a full subcategory of the
 Eilenberg-Moore category. For the enrichment of the Eilenberg-Moore category, we need
 equalizers.

 Contents
 1. Enriched functors from the univalent Kleisli category
 2. Enriched transformations from the univalent Kleisli category
 3. Uniqueness of 2-cells from the univalent Kleisli category

 ****************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.EilenbergMoore.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.KleisliCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentMonad.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.KleisliEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.UnivalentKleisliEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.RezkCompletion.RezkUniversalProperty.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KleisliCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Section EnrichedKleisliUMP.
  Context {V : monoidal_cat}
          (HV : Equalizers V)
          {C : category}
          {E : enrichment C V}
          {M : Monad C}
          (EM : monad_enrichment E M).

  Let K : enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
    := kleisli_incl M ,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM.

  Let K' : enriched_functor_category E (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
    := Left_Kleisli_functor M ,, Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM.

  Let I : enriched_functor_category
            (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
            (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
    := functor_to_kleisli_cat M
       ,,
       functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM.

  Let θθ : K --> comp_enriched_functor_category K' I
    := functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M
       ,,
       functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,

enriched_functor_category E

⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat

C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
FunctorCategory.functor_category C (kleisli_cat M)
⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I), pr1 K ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
(λ f : FunctorCategory.functor_category C
         (kleisli_cat M)
       ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I),
       pr1 K ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I)) (pr2 K)
   f) ?pr1

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
FunctorCategory.functor_category C (kleisli_cat M)
⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I), pr1 K ⟧
 exact (pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M))).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
(λ f : FunctorCategory.functor_category C
         (kleisli_cat M)
       ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I),
       pr1 K ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I)) (pr2 K)
   f)
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M) (pr2 K)
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category K' I))

      apply θθ.
  Defined.

  (** * 1. Enriched functors from the univalent Kleisli category *)
  Section FunctorFromUnivalentKleisli.
    Context {C' : univalent_category}
            (E' : enrichment C' V)
            {F : C ⟶ C'}
            (EF : functor_enrichment F E E')
            {γ : M ∙ F ⟹ F}
            (Eγ : nat_trans_enrichment
                    γ
                    (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF)
                    EF)
            (p : ∏ (x : C), # F (η M x) · γ x = identity _)
            (q : ∏ (x : C), γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x).

    Let FF : enriched_functor_category E E' := F ,, EF.

    Let LL : enriched_functor_category (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
      := functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q
         ,,
         functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p q.

    Let ττ : comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL --> FF
      := functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q
         ,,
         functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p q.

    Definition enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat
      : enriched_functor_category (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
      := lift_enriched_functor_along
           _
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           LL.

    Definition enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans
      : comp_enriched_functor_category
          K
          enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat
        -->
        FF
      := post_whisker_enriched_functor_category
           θθ
           enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat
         · lassociator_enriched_functor_category _ _ _
         · pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
             _
             (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
                _
                (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat M)
                (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
                LL)
         · ττ.

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,

I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,

θθi:= pr1

nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧

E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (post_whisker_enriched_functor_category θθ
        enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat
      · lassociator_enriched_functor_category K' I
          enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat
      · pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K'
          (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
             (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
                M)
             (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                HV EM) LL)))
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
is_nat_z_iso (pr1 ττ)

Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x

  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x

# (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C
        M (M x)),, tt)
· identity
    (pr1 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat
       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
          (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))

        hinhpr
          (M x,,
           identity_z_iso
             (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
                (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
                (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))

           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)

# (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat)

     (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))

   · identity

          enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat

             (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,

              (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
                 M)
              (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                 HV EM) LL)) x · identity (F x))

p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
x: C
# (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C
        M (M x)),, tt)
· (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) · γ x =
# (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
     (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)

    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof

           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) x

  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF

# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x

identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x

LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'

  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'

# (pr11 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C
        M x),, tt) =
# (pr1 enriched_functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat)
  (identity
     (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x))

  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x

  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C M

p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x

           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) x
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x): # (pr1
     (comp_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (lift_enriched_functor_along
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)))
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
· (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) x =
(pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x)
· # (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
μ M x = # M (identity (M x)) · μ M x

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
x: C
r:= nat_trans_ax
  (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) x
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x): # (pr1
     (comp_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (lift_enriched_functor_along
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)))
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
· (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) x =
(pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x)
· # (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
μ M x = μ M x

        apply idpath.

C: category

Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'

  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'

x: C
r:= nat_trans_ax
  (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) x
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x): # (pr1
     (comp_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (lift_enriched_functor_along
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)))
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
· (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) x =

         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x)
· # (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
(pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x)
· # (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x) =
(pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x) · γ x

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧

  (nat_z_iso_inv

nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧

E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'

  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'

x: C
r:= nat_trans_ax
  (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) x
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x): # (pr1
     (comp_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (lift_enriched_functor_along
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)))
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
· (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) x =

         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x)
· # (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
# (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x) = γ x

HV: Equalizers V

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧

  (nat_z_iso_inv

nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧

E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
x: C
r:= nat_trans_ax
  (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) x
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x): # (pr1
     (comp_enriched_functor_category

           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV

# F (identity (M x)) · γ x = γ x

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
F: C ⟶ C'
EF: functor_enrichment F E E'
γ: M ∙ F ⟹ F
Eγ: nat_trans_enrichment γ
  (functor_comp_enrichment EM EF) EF
p: ∏ x : C,
# F (η M x) · γ x =
identity (F (functor_identity C x))
q: ∏ x : C, γ (M x) · γ x = # F (μ M x) · γ x
FF:= F,, EF: enriched_functor_category E E'
LL:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_enrichment EM E' EF Eγ p
  q: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
ττ:= functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans M F γ p q,,
functor_from_kleisli_cat_monad_nat_trans_enrichment
  EM E' EF Eγ p q: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' LL, FF ⟧
x: C
r:= nat_trans_ax
  (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) (M x) x
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x): # (pr1
     (comp_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (lift_enriched_functor_along
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)))
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
· (pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV
              EM)
           (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
              M)
           (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
              HV EM) LL)) x =
(pr11 (lift_enriched_functor_along_comm
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
         (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
            M)
         (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
            HV EM) LL)) (M x)
· # (pr1 LL) (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
γ x = γ x

        apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End FunctorFromUnivalentKleisli.

  Section NatTransFromUnivalentKleisli.
    Context {C' : univalent_category}
            (E' : enrichment C' V)
            {G₁ G₂ : enriched_functor_category (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'}
            (α : comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁
                 -->
                 comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂)
            (p : ∏ (x : C),
                 #(pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · pr11 α x
                 =
                   pr11 α (M x) · #(pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)).

    (** * 2. Enriched transformations from the univalent Kleisli category *)
    Definition enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help
      : comp_enriched_functor_category
          K'
          (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁)
        -->
        comp_enriched_functor_category
          K'
          (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂)
      := rassociator_enriched_functor_category _ _ _
         · post_whisker_enriched_functor_category θθi _
         · α
         · post_whisker_enriched_functor_category θθ _
         · lassociator_enriched_functor_category _ _ _.

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'

⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,

p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (functor_to_kleisli_cat M ∙ pr1 G₁)
  (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
· (pr11 enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
    x =
(pr11 enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  (M x)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (pr1 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
     (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M (M x) x
        (identity (M x))),, tt)
· (identity
     (pr1 G₁
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
           (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
         hinhpr
           (x,,
            identity_z_iso
              (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
                 (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x)))))
   · # (pr11 G₁)
       (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
          (pr1
             (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
                (functor_identity C)
                (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                   C M x))),, tt) · pr1 α x
   · # (pr11 G₂)
       (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
          (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
             C M x),, tt)
   · identity
       (pr1 G₂
          (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
             (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
           hinhpr
             (x,,
              identity_z_iso
                (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x)
                   (μ M x) (Monad_law1 x)
                   (! Monad_law3 x)))))) =
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
     (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)
· (pr11 α) x

· identity

       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)

        hinhpr
          (x,,
           identity_z_iso
             (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
                (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x)))))
· # (pr11 G₁)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (pr1
          (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
             (functor_identity C)
             (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                C M x))),, tt) · pr1 α x
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M x),, tt)
· identity
    (pr1 G₂

        hinhpr

# (pr11 G₁)

K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (pr1 G₁)
  ((make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
      (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
      (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M (M x)
         x (identity (M x))),, tt)
   · (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
        (pr1
           (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
              (functor_identity C)
              (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
              (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                 C M x))),, tt)) · pr1 α x
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M x),, tt) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
?b =
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
     (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)
· (pr11 α) x

E: enrichment C V

I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧

nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

E': enrichment C' V

· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (pr11 G₂)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C
        M x),, tt) =
# (pr1 G₂)
  (identity
     (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C M
     x),, tt =
identity (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x)

pr1
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,

  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'

⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,

p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
pr111 (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
            C M x),, tt) =

         (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x))

          apply idpath.

HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C

K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,

I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧

  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (pr1 G₁)
  ((make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
      (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
      (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M (M x)
         x (identity (M x))),, tt)
   · (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
        (pr1
           (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
              (functor_identity C)
              (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
              (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                 C M x))),, tt)) · pr1 α x
· identity
    (pr1 G₂
       (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x)) =
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
     (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)
· (pr11 α) x

HV: Equalizers V

E: enrichment C V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (pr1 G₁)
  ((make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
      (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
      (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M (M x)
         x (identity (M x))),, tt)
   · (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
        (pr1
           (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
              (functor_identity C)
              (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
              (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                 C M x))),, tt)) =
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
     (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)

(make_mor_eilenberg_moore M

  (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt

pr111 ((make_mor_eilenberg_moore M

V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
(pr11 α) (M x) · # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) =
(pr11 enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  (M x)
· # (functor_to_kleisli_cat M ∙ pr1 G₂)
    (kleisli_monad_nat_trans M x)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
       (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt) =
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x)) (μ M (M x))
        (Monad_law1 (M x)) (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
      hinhpr
        (M x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
              (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
              (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))
· # (pr11 G₁)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
       (pr1
          (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
             (functor_identity C)
             (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M (M x)))
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                C M (M x)))),, tt) · pr1 α (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M (M x)),, tt)
· identity
    (pr1 G₂
       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
          (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
          (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
        hinhpr
          (M x,,
           identity_z_iso
             (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
                (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
                (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))
· # (pr1 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
       (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M (M x)
          x (identity (M x))),, tt)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
       (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt) =
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x)) (μ M (M x))
        (Monad_law1 (M x)) (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
      hinhpr
        (M x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
              (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
              (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))
· (# (pr11 G₁)
     (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
        (pr1
           (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
              (functor_identity C)
              (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M (M x)))
              (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                 C M (M x)))),, tt)
   · (pr1 α (M x)
      · (# (pr11 G₂)
           (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
              (identity (M (M x)))
              (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                 C M (M x)),, tt)
         · (identity
              (pr1 G₂
                 (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
                    (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
                    (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
                  hinhpr
                    (M x,,
                     identity_z_iso
                       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M
                          (M (M x)) (μ M (M x))
                          (Monad_law1 (M x))
                          (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))
            · # (pr1 G₂)
                (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
                   (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
                   (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof
                      C M (M x) x (identity (M x))),,
                 tt)))))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
       (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt) =
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M (M x)))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M (M x)))),, tt)
· (pr1 α (M x)
   · (# (pr11 G₂)
        (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
           (identity (M (M x)))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M (M x)),, tt)
      · # (pr1 G₂)
          (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
             (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M
                (M x) x (identity (M x))),, tt)))

p: ∏ x : C,

x: C
# (pr11 G₁)

           (functor_identity C)

(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂)

       (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)

x: C
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))

V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M (M x)))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M (M x)))),, tt) =
# (pr1 G₁)
  (identity
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x)) (μ M (M x))
        (Monad_law1 (M x)) (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
      hinhpr
        (M x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
              (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
              (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))

HV: Equalizers V

E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C

K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
  (pr1
     (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
        (functor_identity C)
        (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M (M x)))
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
           C M (M x)))),, tt =
identity
  (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x)) (μ M (M x))
     (Monad_law1 (M x)) (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
   hinhpr
     (M x,,
      identity_z_iso
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
           (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
           (! Monad_law3 (M x)))))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
pr111 (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M (M x)))
         (pr1
            (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
               (functor_identity C)
               (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M (M x)))
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                  C M (M x)))),, tt) =
pr111 (identity
         (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
            (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
            (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
          hinhpr
            (M x,,
             identity_z_iso
               (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
                  (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
                  (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))

          apply idpath.

HV: Equalizers V

functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
x: C
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x)) (μ M (M x))
        (Monad_law1 (M x)) (! Monad_law3 (M x)),,
      hinhpr
        (M x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M (M x))
              (μ M (M x)) (Monad_law1 (M x))
              (! Monad_law3 (M x))))))
· (pr1 α (M x)
   · (# (pr11 G₂)
        (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
           (identity (M (M x)))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M (M x)),, tt)
      · # (pr1 G₂)
          (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M
             (# M (identity (M x)) · μ M x)
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_data_subproof C M
                (M x) x (identity (M x))),, tt))) =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (μ M x)
       (kleisli_nat_trans_subproof C M x),, tt)

                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
        (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
      hinhpr
        (x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
              (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x)))))
· # (pr11 G₁)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (pr1
          (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
             (functor_identity C)
             (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                C M x))),, tt) · pr1 α x
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M x),, tt)
· identity
    (pr1 G₂
       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
          (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
        hinhpr
          (x,,
           identity_z_iso
             (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
                (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x))))) =
(pr11 α) x

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M x))),, tt) · pr1 α x
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M x),, tt) = (pr11 α) x

HV: Equalizers V
C: category

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)

nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
