⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category

                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))

                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'

               (comp_enriched_functor_category

HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =

       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1

         (pr2

               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ

V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)

  (pr2

q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑

             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)

        M x),, tt) =
# (pr1 G₂)
  (identity
     (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x))

                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2

                  HV EM) G₁))

               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ

  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof C M
     x),, tt =
identity (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,

     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

                     HV EM) G₁),

                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,

         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment

        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1

               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
pr111 (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
         (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
            C M x),, tt) =
pr111 (identity
         (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x))

        apply idpath.

· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)

  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))

  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'

comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

                    HV EM) G₁))

                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)

        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑

                     HV EM) G₁),

        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)

           HV EM) ζζ)) =

       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,

# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
     (pr1

           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))

              C M x))),, tt) · pr1 α x
· identity
    (pr1 G₂

     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)

q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑

               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1

nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

p: ∏ x : C,

· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)

     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,

EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M x))),, tt) =
# (pr1 G₁)
  (identity
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
        (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
      hinhpr
        (x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
              (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x)))))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
  (pr1
     (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
        (functor_identity C)
        (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
           C M x))),, tt =
identity
  (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
     (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
   hinhpr
     (x,,
      identity_z_iso
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
           (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x))))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
pr111 (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x))
         (pr1
            (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
               (functor_identity C)
               (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x))
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                  C M x))),, tt) =
pr111 (identity
         (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
            (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
          hinhpr
            (x,,
             identity_z_iso
               (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x)
                  (μ M x) (Monad_law1 x)
                  (! Monad_law3 x)))))

        apply idpath.

HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
x: C
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : ∑
         f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
               (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
             ⟦ pr1
                 (comp_enriched_functor_category
                    (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                     functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                       HV EM) G₁),
             pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
         Core.mor_disp
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₁))
           (pr2
              (comp_enriched_functor_category
                 (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                  functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                    HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along_comm
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
        M)
     (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
        HV EM) ζζ): (λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x)
  (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
      functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
     (lift_enriched_nat_trans_along
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
        (essentially_surjective_functor_to_kleisli_cat
           M)
        (fully_faithful_functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
           HV EM) ζζ)) =
(λ z : ∑
       f : FunctorCategory.functor_category
             (Kleisli_cat_monad M) C'
           ⟦ pr1
               (comp_enriched_functor_category
                  (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                   functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                     HV EM) G₁),
           pr1
             (comp_enriched_functor_category
                (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                 functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                   HV EM) G₂) ⟧,
       Core.mor_disp
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₁))
         (pr2
            (comp_enriched_functor_category
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
                functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment
                  HV EM) G₂)) f, (pr11 z) x) ζζ
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
        (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x),,
      hinhpr
        (x,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x) (μ M x)
              (Monad_law1 x) (! Monad_law3 x)))))
· pr1 α x = (pr11 α) x

      apply id_left.
    Qed.

    (** * 3. Uniqueness of 2-cells from the univalent Kleisli category *)
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
(pr11 β₁) x = (pr11 β₂) x

HV: Equalizers V
C: category

M: Monad C

  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =

· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)

nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'

  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2

  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
(pr11 β₁) x = (pr11 β₂) x

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))

HV: Equalizers V
C: category

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,

  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
β₁ = β₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
r: β₁ = β₂
(pr11 β₁) x = (pr11 β₂) x

        exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z x) r).
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
β₁ = β₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V

I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧

  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
pre_whisker (Left_Kleisli_functor M)

     (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) β₁)) =

comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'

comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
∏ x : C,
pre_whisker (Left_Kleisli_functor M)
  (pr1
     (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) β₁))
  x =
pr1 enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help

V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
(pr11 β₁)
  (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
     (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
   hinhpr
     (x0,,
      identity_z_iso
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
           (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0)))) =
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
        (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
      hinhpr
        (x0,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
              (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0)))))
· # (pr11 G₁)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
       (pr1
          (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
             (functor_identity C)
             (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                C M x0))),, tt) · pr1 α x0
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M x0),, tt)
· identity
    (pr1 G₂
       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
          (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
        hinhpr
          (x0,,
           identity_z_iso
             (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0)
                (μ M x0) (Monad_law1 x0)
                (! Monad_law3 x0)))))

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x

x0: C
(pr11 α) x0 =
identity
  (pr1 G₁

          C M x0),, tt) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
?b = (pr11 α) x0

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'

⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =

  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))

           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M x0))),, tt) · pr1 α x0
· identity
    (pr1 G₂
       (Full.full_img_functor_obj (free_alg_em M) x0)) =
(pr11 α) x0

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
# (pr11 G₁)
  (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M x0))),, tt) · pr1 α x0 = (pr11 α) x0

  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
  (pr1
     (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
        (functor_identity C)
        (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
           C M x0))),, tt =
identity
  (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
     (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
   hinhpr
     (x0,,
      identity_z_iso
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
           (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0))))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
pr111 (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
         (pr1
            (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
               (functor_identity C)
               (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                  C M x0))),, tt) =
pr111 (identity
         (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
            (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
          hinhpr
            (x0,,
             identity_z_iso
               (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0)
                  (μ M x0) (Monad_law1 x0)
                  (! Monad_law3 x0)))))

          apply idpath.

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'

  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'

β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
        (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
      hinhpr

         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
              (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0)))))
· pr1 α x0 = (pr11 α) x0

        apply id_left.

# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
∏ x : C,
pre_whisker (Left_Kleisli_functor M)
  (pr1
     (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
         functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) β₂))
  x =
pr1 enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help
  x

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
(pr11 β₂)
  (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
     (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
   hinhpr
     (x0,,
      identity_z_iso
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
           (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0)))) =
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
        (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
      hinhpr
        (x0,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
              (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0)))))
· # (pr11 G₁)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
       (pr1
          (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
             (functor_identity C)
             (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
             (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                C M x0))),, tt) · pr1 α x0
· # (pr11 G₂)
    (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
       (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
          C M x0),, tt)
· identity
    (pr1 G₂
       (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
          (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
        hinhpr
          (x0,,
           identity_z_iso
             (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0)
                (μ M x0) (Monad_law1 x0)
                (! Monad_law3 x0)))))

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x

x0: C
(pr11 α) x0 =
identity

     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)

functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧

  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)

E': enrichment C' V

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =

· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)

  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)

  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
?b = (pr11 α) x0

p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =

· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)

  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x

# (pr11 G₁)

           (functor_identity C)

  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'

p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)

  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2

  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧

(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
# (pr11 G₁)

     (pr1
        (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
           (functor_identity C)

           (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
              C M x0))),, tt) · pr1 α x0 = (pr11 α) x0

        (functor_identity C)
        (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
        (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
           C M x0))),, tt =
identity
  (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
     (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
   hinhpr
     (x0,,
      identity_z_iso
        (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
           (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0))))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
pr111 (make_mor_eilenberg_moore M (identity (M x0))
         (pr1
            (Dialgebras.is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra M
               (functor_identity C)
               (is_z_isomorphism_identity (M x0))
               (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans_subproof
                  C M x0))),, tt) =
pr111 (identity
         (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
            (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
          hinhpr
            (x0,,
             identity_z_iso
               (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0)
                  (μ M x0) (Monad_law1 x0)
                  (! Monad_law3 x0)))))

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: Equalizers V
C: category
E: enrichment C V
M: Monad C
EM: monad_enrichment E M
K:= kleisli_incl M,, kleisli_incl_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
K':= Left_Kleisli_functor M,,
Left_Kleisli_functor_enrichment EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
I:= functor_to_kleisli_cat M,,
functor_to_kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM)
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
θθ:= functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_trans M,,
functor_to_kleisli_incl_nat_trans_enrichment HV EM: enriched_functor_category E
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) ⟦ K,
comp_enriched_functor_category K' I ⟧
θθi:= pr1
  (nat_z_iso_inv
     (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)),,
nat_z_iso_inv_enrichment
  (functor_to_kleisli_cat_incl_nat_z_iso M)
  (let X := pr2 θθ in X): enriched_functor_category E (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM)
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K' I, K ⟧
C': univalent_category
E': enrichment C' V
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E'
α: enriched_functor_category E E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category K G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category K G₂ ⟧
p: ∏ x : C,
# (pr11 G₁) (kleisli_nat_trans M x) · (pr11 α) x =
(pr11 α) (M x)
· # (pr11 G₂) (kleisli_nat_trans M x)
ζζ:= nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad M
  (pr1
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq,,
nat_trans_from_kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM E'
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁))
  (pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂))
  (pr2
     enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help)
  enriched_nat_trans_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_help_eq: enriched_functor_category
  (Kleisli_cat_monad_enrichment EM) E'
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category I G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category I G₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: enriched_functor_category
  (kleisli_cat_enrichment HV EM) E' ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
q₁: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₁))
  x = (pr11 α) x
q₂: ∏ x : C,
(pr11 (pre_whisker_enriched_functor_category K β₂))
  x = (pr11 α) x
x: kleisli_cat M
x0: C
identity
  (pr1 G₁
     (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
        (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0),,
      hinhpr
        (x0,,
         identity_z_iso
           (make_ob_eilenberg_moore M (M x0) (μ M x0)
              (Monad_law1 x0) (! Monad_law3 x0)))))
· pr1 α x0 = (pr11 α) x0

        apply id_left.
    Qed.
  End NatTransFromUnivalentKleisli.
End EnrichedKleisliUMP.
